## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, discuss recent deep dives, and plan next steps for Udemy's content production with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on AI transformation content, starting with pillar pieces on AI literacy and upskilling](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Leverage webinar transcripts and potentially course content to inform high-quality, unique articles](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Prioritize improving page load speeds across Udemy's web properties to boost SEO and conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Aim to ramp up to producing 5 articles per week, starting with pillar content development](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

## Topics

### Recent Deep Dive Sessions Recap

  - [Four sessions held since last sync, including intro with Stef and alignment on content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Met with DemandGen team (Jan) and discussed authorship, content sources with Justin and Krista](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Emphasis on unified SEO strategy, avoiding parallel tracks](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Explored leveraging webinar transcripts and lecture content to inform articles](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Content Focus and Structure

  - [Concentrate on AI transformation topic, particularly AI literacy and upskilling](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Utilize pillar-cluster model for content organization](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Create comprehensive pillar pages with related cluster articles](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Align with Justin's vision on pillar-cluster organization within the UB content scorecard](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### Strategic Content Considerations

  - [Stef emphasized need to map content to broader business goals and product vision](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Balance SEO-driven topics with showcasing Udemy's full capabilities (e.g., hands-on labs, role-play features)](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Incorporate skills validation and ecosystem perspective into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)

### Technical SEO Priorities

  - [Critical need to improve page load speeds across Udemy properties](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Current load times are 2x above Google's "poor" threshold](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [SEO team taking a holistic view of technical issues across all Udemy domains](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Slow speeds affecting blog and consumer performance](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Content Production Plan

  - [Start with developing pillar pieces on AI literacy and upskilling](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Aim to access webinar transcripts to inform pillar content](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Ramp up to producing 5 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Consider experimenting with different content approaches and formats](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Glenn to reflect agreed-upon scope changes](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Justin to arrange access to webinar transcripts and explore 24Fathom platform capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Team to provide webinar transcripts to GrowthX by early next week](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [GrowthX to update calibration article and content OS in Airtable based on Justin's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Begin development of pillar pieces on AI literacy and upskilling](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Justin to get up to speed on accessing lecture article database for future use](https://fathom.video/share/vDpVXcZJTRc2mWBoVF66qC1rfoH9rrV3?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
